name: Minicor
long_description:
AI companies selling into legacy industries can't go live because their customers' systems of record are Windows desktop apps with no APIs. The only way in is clicking through the UI, and it breaks constantly.

Minicor is a platform for building self-healing desktop automations at scale. Speak the automation into existence through your favourite coding agent via our MCP, or to us directly, and get an API endpoint to trigger it. One API call triggers a full desktop workflow on a Windows VM. On-premise, cloud, or Citrix.

Video replay, error logging, and scaling built in.
one_liner: Managed, self healing desktop automation at scale
